name: peripheral-layer
title: Peripheral Layer (外设层)
description: 外设层：把外部世界的【异步通知】(email/社媒/webhook/收款/订阅)每源一个 adapter 归一成统一信封(IME)，投进【统一收件箱】(与 ceo-loop inbox 合一，goal 完成事件同走一口)；CEO 以【tool 调用返回结果】形态被动收取(push/不打断/一条一条)。重点=标准接口+加新源零核心改动。只管异步;同步/流式不接;安全后置。设计见 design.md。
creator: weston
notes: Done via PR #193 (merge 1b679c7). Phase 0-6 complete: make_ime/IME 5-field envelope, FileInbox (JSONL+cursor, append/poll_one/peek+ack), receive() tool, email+webhook adapters (zero-core-change seam), goal_inbox.ime_notifier (goal events on same inbox), peripheral resident compose service. 147 tests + real-LLM live e2e (incl. mid-processing arrival buffering). Contracts in spec/backend/peripheral-layer-contracts.md. Deferred: security (injection/trust/ordering/rate-limit) + .seen unbounded growth (TTL).
